name: Lego Movies
description: Brick-built wisdom and one-liners from the Lego movie universe, with a heavy dose of Ninjago.
author: Quips Editorial

quotes.content: Citizens of Ninjago! Get ready to welcome your new overlord... who goes by the name of... Garmadon!
Students, true ninja knows when to fight, and when to become one with the elements.
I wish you weren't my father.
quotes.notes: Lloyd's line after unmasking to his father.

quotes.content: I believe in each of you!
How could I ruin your life? I wasn't even there.
Dude, give me a hug, man. Give me a birthday hug!
I mean, my mom is weird, and collects seashells. Your dad levels cities and attacks innocent people.
quotes.notes: Jay trying to comfort Lloyd about his supervillain dad.

quotes.content: Let's rock!
Hello, fellow teenager.
Oh, I'd say it's about a seven... point... arm ripped off.
Long before time had a name, the First Spinjitzu Master created Ninjago using four elemental weapons.
quotes.source: Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu, Season 1 (opening narration) (c. 2011)
quotes.notes: The show's recurring mythos-establishing opening narration.

quotes.content: This roof isn't big enough for the four of us.
quotes.notes: Kai's comic complaint about Zane's odd behavior.

quotes.content: Peace is boring. There's no one to save. There's nothing to do.
quotes.source: Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu, S1E1 'Rise of the Snakes' (2011)
quotes.notes: Jay complaining about the quiet after Garmadon's escape.

quotes.content: Evil doesn't sleep and neither should you!
A ninja never admits defeat. A ninja always picks himself up when he's down.
quotes.source: Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu, S1 'All of Nothing' (2011)

quotes.content: One day, a talented lass or fellow, a special one with face of yellow, will make the Piece of Resistance found, from its hiding refuge underground, and with a noble army at the helm, this Master Builder will thwart the Kragle and save the realm, and be the greatest, most interesting, most important person of all times.
quotes.notes: The film's central prophecy of the Special.

quotes.content: The only thing anyone needs to be special is to believe that you can be. I know that sounds like a cat poster, but it's true.
quotes.notes: Vitruvius revealing the prophecy was invented.

quotes.content: I hate this place.
I will text you.
quotes.notes: Batman's non-committal breakup line to Wyldstyle.

quotes.content: Yes I can. 'Cause I'm Batman.
quotes.notes: Batman's response to Alfred about living alone forever.

quotes.content: Because last I checked I only had one butt.
Iron Man sucks!
quotes.notes: One of Batman's many self-aggrandizing one-liners.

quotes.content: You're a fish! You're a frog! You're a fish-frog!
quotes.notes: Cameo gag during the villain-team-up sequence.

quotes.content: Wait, does Batman live in Bruce Wayne's basement?
quotes.notes: Robin's naive early misunderstanding of Batman's identity.

quotes.content: I'm you. From the future. All grown up.
quotes.source: The Lego Movie 2: The Second Part (2019)

quotes.content: I'll never grow up to be like you... We're not alone in this world.
quotes.source: The Lego Movie 2: The Second Part (2019)

quotes.content: It's over, Rex. Emmet's never gonna be you. But you can be like him.
quotes.source: The Lego Movie 2: The Second Part (2019)
